landing.hero_title: Protect Your Farm with AI-Powered Intelligence
landing.hero_subtitle: Real-time weather alerts, crop loss predictions, and government scheme guidance for Indian smallholder farmers
landing.feature_1_desc: Live weather forecasts, flood warnings, and pest alerts for your district
landing.feature_2_desc: AI-driven loss predictions and actionable protection strategies
landing.feature_3_desc: Matched recommendations for applicable PMFBY, PM-KISAN, and more
landing.feature_4_desc: Interface in Odia, Hindi, and English for accessibility
landing.footer_about: KISANBODHI is an autonomous multi-agent AI system protecting India's smallholder farmers through NITI Aayog policy framework.
